subject: You already have a profile on OpenMentor
html:
Hi {{first_name}},

We received a new mentor application with this email address, but a mentor profile with this email already exists on OpenMentor.

If that profile is yours, there's no need to register again — just sign in to your dashboard. Request a magic link with this email address and we'll send it right over, no password needed:

Log in to your dashboard

From the dashboard you can manage mentorship requests, update your availability, and edit your profile.

If something doesn't look right or you can't get in, write to us at hello@openmentor.io — we'll be happy to help.

If you didn't submit this application, you can safely ignore this email.

The OpenMentor Team

This is an automated message from OpenMentor

https://openmentor.io
text:
Hi {{first_name}},

We received a new mentor application with this email address, but a mentor profile with this email already exists on OpenMentor.

If that profile is yours, there's no need to register again — just sign in to your dashboard. Request a magic link with this email address and we'll send it right over, no password needed:

https://openmentor.io/mentor/login

From the dashboard you can manage mentorship requests, update your availability, and edit your profile.

If something doesn't look right or you can't get in, write to us at hello@openmentor.io — we'll be happy to help.

If you didn't submit this application, you can safely ignore this email.

The OpenMentor Team
